titleStmt.title: SII 30.265: original edition by N. Marxia Gandhi, A. Padmavathy and S. Swaminathan

No. 265. (A.R. No. 617 of 1915.) Paṉamalai, Villupuram Taluk, South Arcot District. Tāḷapurīśvara temple-on the steps of the maṇḍapa in front of the temple Navāb Sāhullēkhāṉ Sāyabu: Śaka 1519, Ānanda, Friday, Ārdra: 1597 A.D.

summary.p: This unfinished record registers that a certain Tāṇḍavarāya tambirāṉ, son of Chokkanātha Piḷḷai, a native of Vēppattūr located in the Chōḻa country, paid a visit to Paṉasai Nagar to have a dharsaṉ of the God Tāḷapurīśvarar, while he was on a pilgrimage to Kāsi and Gaṅgai.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī mahāma
ṇṭa
lecuvarar rācātirāca
r rācaparamecuvarar cīmāṟttā
ṇṭarāṉa navāpu cākullekā
ṉ cāyapu Avarkaḷ piṟativi rācci
yam paṇṇiaruḷ(ā) taṉ cālivākaṉa
cakāṟtam 1000 5 100 10 9 kku yitiṉ
mel cellāniṉṟa Āṉantavaruṣam
tiruvātirai naṣattiramum cukkiṟavāramum tiṟaiyoteci
yum kūṭiṉa cupatiṉattil paṉacainakar taḷamavāyīcuvara
ṉ perile coḻatecattil veppattūr cokkaṉāta
piḷḷai kumāraṉ tāṇṭavarāyaṉ tampirāṉ paramecuvara yā
liṅka tericaṉam paṇṇa komakātemuṅka
var Eḻuntaruḷap paṇṇi Eṭuttukkoṇ
ṭu kāci kaṅkai yāttirai poka veṇumeṉ
ṟu varukaiyil paṉacainakar tāḷakiricuvarar caṉ
ṉatikku vantu tericaṉam paṇṇukuṟa nimittiyam
poleyirukkiṟa Ammaṉ cuṉaiyil pi
cāṉa malaiyil sanamRead- sanat
Digital edition of SII 30.265 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
